scripts.typecheck: bun x tsc -p package/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p examples/basic/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p examples/basic/src/renderer/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p examples/ipc-smoke/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p examples/ipc-smoke/src/renderer/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p examples/multitab-browser/tsconfig.json --noEmit && bun x tsc -p examples/multitab-browser/src/renderer/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.build:native:win: cmake -S package -B package/build/win -DBUNITE_TARGET_ARCH=x64 && cmake --build package/build/win --config Release
